case_title: STEVE CAPLINGER VS. DISH NETWORK, LLC
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER DISH NETWORK LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER DISH NETWORK, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ORDER IS SIGNED. COUNSEL FOR DISH NETWORK IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DISH NETWORK LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Dish Network, LLC's petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted.

Order is signed. Counsel for Dish Network is required to prepare a proposed Judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
